home.welcome_subtitle: Here is a live snapshot of your workspaces, reminders, and recent backend activity.
home.empty_recent_projects_body: Connect a GitHub repository or Jira workspace to start building your project timeline.

documents.title: Document Analysis
documents.description: Upload resumes and process documents through the backend parser.

analyzer.title: Repo Analyzer
analyzer.description: Review GitHub repositories and Jira workspaces with the main server bridge.

events.title: Upcoming Events
events.description: Follow deadlines, reminders, and registered opportunities from the scheduler.

analyzer.intro_subtitle: Paste a GitHub repository or Jira workspace link below to begin live analysis.
analyzer.visualizer_caption: Link a repository or board to generate a live architecture graph.

cards.title: Dynamic Visualisation
cards.description: Live architecture graphs built from indexed workspace context.

cards.title: Jira Analyse
cards.description: Inspect projects, tickets, and linked workflow context.

cards.title: GitHub Analyse
cards.description: Review repositories, code structure, and indexed files.

cards.title: Project Improvements
cards.description: Surface grounded risks, recommendations, and next actions.

cards.title: AI Chat
cards.description: Ask follow-up questions against the current workspace context.

copy.default_greeting: Hello! I am your project assistant. Add a GitHub repository or Jira workspace and I will help analyze it.
copy.linked_prefix: I am ready to work with
copy.linked_suffix: What would you like me to do?
copy.fallback_waiting: The workspace analysis is still warming up. Ask again after indexing finishes for grounded answers.

events.title: Events and Momentum
events.subtitle: Track hackathons, submission windows, and reminders already scheduled in the backend.
events.empty_state_body: Once you register for an event or add a custom reminder, it will appear here automatically.
events.momentum_default_body: Your score is now calculated from live reminders instead of placeholder values.
